picks.quote: I think King Green will get the job done. However, Jeremy Stephens, one punch is all it takes, but still, I'm going with the King.
I love Sean Brady. I've got to go with Joaquin Buckley. Okay, the man is confident.
The question is, will he beat Waldo Cortez Acosta? I say no. Let's just get right to it. Waldo is flying right now.
But who wins the fight? I got to go with Tatsuro Taira. I think he's by far the more technical fighter.
I'm beating about the bush. I think Khamzat wins. I do. I do. I could be wrong. I think Khamzat wins. That's my gut feeling.
